channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Curtis Jones scores 25 points in rare start to lead No. 2 Iowa St to 74-57 win over No. 9 Kansas
item.description: AMES, Iowa (AP) — Curtis Jones scored 25 points in his second start of the season to lead No. 2 Iowa State to a 74-57 win over No. 9 Kansas on Wednesday night, the Cyclones' 12th straight victory.
item.dc:creator: PAVLE MARKOVIC, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patrick Mahomes ready to play after birth of child
item.description: Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes spent Sunday watching some wild-card playoff games while waiting for his wife, Brittany, to give birth to their third child.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jack Hoffman, young cancer patient who captured hearts of Nebraska and nation with 2013 TD run, dies
item.description: Jack Hoffman, the cancer patient who captured the hearts of Nebraska football fans and inspired the nation as a 7-year-old when he ran for a touchdown during the Cornhuskers' 2013 spring game, has died at the age of 19.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jayden Daniels to Terry McLaurin connection has blossomed for the Commanders
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — When the Washington Commanders had to have it — fourth down, trailing in the fourth quarter of a playoff game — Jayden Daniels found Terry McLaurin in the end zone for a touchdown.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TCU women forfeited games and had open tryouts a year ago. They are now a top-10 team atop Big 12
item.description: FORT WORTH, Texas (AP) — The TCU women had to forfeit two games and conduct open tryouts on campus last January because they didn't have enough healthy players.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SuperMotocross World Championship comes to San Diego: What to know
item.description: Snapdragon Stadium will host the Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship on Saturday, continuing the legacy of off-road motorsports in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Texas QB Quinn Ewers declares for NFL draft as program ushers in Arch Manning era
item.description: Texas junior quarterback Quinn Ewers has declared for the NFL draft, ending a Longhorns career in which he led the program to a Big 12 championship and twice to the College Football Playoff but was not always embraced by a fan base eagerly waiting for Arch Manning to take over.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: MLB 1st-round draft pick to take shot at college football with South Alabama
item.description: Former MLB first-round draft pick Bubba Thompson will pursue collegiate football this spring as a walk-on for the South Alabama Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs’ Andy Reid shares parenting advice after Patrick, Brittany Mahomes welcome 3rd child
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs head coach Andy Reid shared his view on parenting after quarterback Patrick Mahomes welcomed his third child on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: Naomi Osaka is back in a Slam's 3rd round for the 1st time in 3 years
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Naomi Osaka's second-round match at the Australian Open could not possibly have started in a worse way. All of 21 minutes in, she sailed a forehand service return well long and, just like that, trailed 5-0.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coco Gauff is into the Australian Open's 3rd round and still unbeaten in 2025
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Coco Gauff stretched her unbeaten start to 2025 to seven matches and 14 sets by moving into the third round at the Australian Open with a 6-3, 7-5 victory over 173rd-ranked Jodie Burrage of Britain at Rod Laver Arena on Wednesday. Gauff, the 2023 U.S.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU bounces back with 85-69 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team snapped a three-game losing skid with an 85-69 win over Oklahoma State Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: The team later confirmed Emil Heineman suffered an "upper-body" injury and is expected to be sidelined for three to four weeks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Former Padres Peavy, Gonzalez headline 77th Salute to the Champions
item.description: The Padres duo, along with WNBA star Charde Houston, now have a permanent place inside the Western Metal Supply Company building at Petco Park as Breitbard Hall of Famers.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Verlander uses supermodel wife's name on Giants introductory Zoom call, causing awkward moment
item.description: (KRON) -- Justin Verlander uses his wife's account for Zoom calls, and a member of the San Francisco media got a kick out of it. His account name caused a funny moment during his introductory press conference on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Mike McCarthy not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy is not returning as head coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hyman scores in 3rd period as the Oilers rally past the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: Zach Hyman scored a tiebreaking power-play goal in the third period, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LA Rams head for Arizona and a crucial playoff game with their minds on their fire-ravaged hometown
item.description: The Los Angeles Rams wrapped up practice at their training complex Friday under blue skies with bruise-colored clouds of wildfire smoke lurking on the horizon.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former finalist Josiah Cox relishing opportunity to return with SDSU football
item.description: Cox had 35 tackles and two interceptions for the Aggies in his year in Las Cruces, including an impressive performance against ranked Texas A&M. Those skills were apparent to SDSU head coach Sean Lewis and a retooled defensive coaching staff.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Notre Dame secures spot in the CFP National Championship after win over Penn State
item.description: Notre Dame has secured a spot in the College Football Playoff National Championship game after defeating Penn State 27-24 in the Orange Bowl on Thursday night. This is a breaking news update, the original story can be found below. No. 3 Notre Dame (13-1, CFP No. 7 seed) vs. No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC loses to Stanley Cup champs, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to struggle at home, losing its fourth straight game at the Delta Center Wednesday night to the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5
